subject: Re: Takeoffs
body:
the libaray hard is incorrect ,, but I think the
landscaping is not included.. we will talk tomorrow

--- John Amerling <jamerling@rrcaribbean.com> wrote:

> Enclosed is our take off of enclosed space and
> hardscape. Would you please
> check this against your own numbers. I am aware that
> the chart does not
> break out air conditioned space for the indoor pool
> expansion. We had a
> problem reading the CAD data so we sent the chart
> out without the
> information.  I am going to present some information
> to Mr. Epstein tomorrow
> and I want all of us to be in agreement as to the
> baseline take offs. Please
> contact me as soon as possible about this. Our
> assistant engineer, Matt
> Disney, did these take offs internally. He will be
> in tomorrow at 8:30 AM
> and I should like to arrive at an agreed upon number
> right away. 
> 
>  
> 
>   _____  
> 
> From: Raphael Lanoy
> [mailto:lagonda@molyneuxstudio.com]

> Hello.

> Plans of the library and the main house – for square
> footage only.
> 
> Thank you,

body_html:
the libaray hard is incorrect ,, but I think the
landscaping is not included.. we will talk tomorrow

--- John Amerling jamerling@rrcaribbean.com wrote:

Enclosed is our take off of enclosed space and
hardscape. Would you please
check this against your own numbers. I am aware that
the chart does not
break out air conditioned space for the indoor pool
expansion. We had a
problem reading the CAD data so we sent the chart
out without the
information. I am going to present some information
to Mr. Epstein tomorrow
and I want all of us to be in agreement as to the
baseline take offs. Please
contact me as soon as possible about this. Our
assistant engineer, Matt
Disney, did these take offs internally. He will be
in tomorrow at 8:30 AM
and I should like to arrive at an agreed upon number
right away.

From: Raphael Lanoy
[mailto:lagonda@molyneuxstudio.com]
Sent: Monday, October 09, 2006 10:05 AM
To: jamerling@rrcaribbean.com
Subject: plans

Hello.

Plans of the library and the main house – for square
footage only.

Thank you,

Raphaël Lanoy
